companyUrl.title: Trustpilot Company URL or Domain
companyUrl.description: Trustpilot review page URL (e.g., https://www.trustpilot.com/review/example.com) or just the domain (e.g., example.com).

maxItems.title: Max Reviews
maxItems.description: Maximum number of reviews to extract.

maxRunTimeMinutes.title: Max Run Time (Minutes)
maxRunTimeMinutes.description: Gracefully kills the scraper after this many minutes to prevent runaway costs.
